description: Create a product portfolio analysis workbook named 'portfolio_analysis' in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\'. On a canvas named 'Portfolio Analysis', build a Scatter (Bubble) visualization titled 'Product Sub-Category Portfolio Analysis' to identify product sub-categories with high sales and varying profitability. Configure the visualization with 'Sales' on the X-Axis, 'Profit' on the Y-Axis, 'Quantity Ordered' for Size, 'Product Category' for Color, and 'Product Sub Category' for Detail/Category.
